description: Hamas is a Sunni Islamist Palestinian nationalist political organization with a military wing, the al-Qassam Brigades. Founded in 1987 by Ahmed Yassin during the First Intifada, it has governed the Gaza Strip since 2007. It advocates for Palestinian statehood and resistance against Israeli occupation, and has been involved in multiple conflicts with Israel.
